description: Bot pretending to be Chrome but missing Sec-Fetch-*, Sec-Ch-Ua-* client hints, and no Accept-Language (key browser tell). Detection builds over multiple requests via BehavioralWaveform + Inconsistency. First 2 requests are borderline; detection firms up by request 3.
